thesis_summary: Bullish continuation is valid only if the gap-up pullback holds overnight demand and price accepts above VWAP rather than rejecting the 29400-29420 area.

checks.label: Pre-open gap posture holds above demand
checks.rationale: The bullish case depends on price staying above the overnight demand shelf instead of returning into prior-day value.

checks.label: Open avoids immediate gap-up rejection
checks.rationale: A fast spike above 29400 that fails would flip the session from bullish continuation to gap-up rejection.

checks.label: First 30-minute low defends gap support
checks.rationale: Breaking below this level would show the gap is being sold instead of absorbed.

checks.label: Late morning holds above VWAP
checks.rationale: VWAP control is needed to convert early rotation into trend continuation.

checks.label: Midday accepts above overnight high zone
checks.rationale: Acceptance above 29420 confirms buyers absorbed the obvious supply and can widen the upside target.
